text: Narrated *Amir [bifi Sa'd [Binl Abi Waqgas: from his father who said: "When this Ayah was revealed: ‘Come, let us call our sons and your sons, our women and your women... (361)’ the Messenger of Allh (SAW) called A, Fatimah, [Hasa| and Husain and ‘said: O Allah! This s my family."* Grade: Sahih (Darussalam) S —
